programming languages in software world. Venus also brings
creativity to the table, and there is a need to be creative in

whatever
they
do;
whether
it's
computer
programming,
engineering, or being an actor.

## Mercury+ Venus + Mars + Ketu conjunction:

This conjunction may benefit Mercury, in terms of having the
ability to quickly calculate solutions, working with numbers, and
even being a professional in the medical field. However, the planet
that needs the most help is Venus. Being surrounded by malefic
twins (Mars and Ketu) there is a great dissatisfaction from male
partners, wife, husband, and marriage. Marriage can lead to
physical violence if it happens too early. If Venus has the lowest
degree, it would be able to handle the force of Mars and
detachment of Ketu, while influencing all the planets and bringing
harmony, love, and creativity on all aspects. Ketu will have a
creative way to search for spirituality, while Mars will have
creativity in his action, and Mercury will have creative intelligence
and creative communication. Ketu also represents mastery over
things related to the house where it's placed; because those were
the things you mastered in your past life. When Venus is attached
to Ketu, then creativity is not a problem for these people.

## Mercury + Mars + Jupiter + Saturn conjunction:

The communication has harsh, straight forward and has a cold
quality to it. This conjunction gives great communication but
heavy power. When they speak, they speak with purpose,
otherwise they would keep quiet. When 3 planets of mature action
are with Mercury, he is forced to behave like them and cheer for
their quality. This can be great when one is an attorney, school
principle, judge or a preacher, because one has to be careful of
what they say when in the position of power and fame. But, the
message is never negative; it can also be a straightforward positive
message. When they say "You can do this," you will do it. This is
why this can make for a great sports coach and even a captain of a

team. In the corporate world, this conjunction is a great advantage
in managing other people because communication and work ethic
will be serious and to the point.

## Mercury + Mars + Jupiter + Rahu conjunction:

This conjunction can give quite a mixed result, depending upon
which planet has the closest degree to Mercury or Jupiter. Jupiter
is being forced give up his qualities of wisdom and optimism to the
sneaky Rahu, who will take Jupiter's wisdom and will try to get
Mercury to commit ill acts. Mercury will not only be forced to
have harsh speech, but may also have a two faced personality
where one side will come out as an intellectual who is filled with
worldly wisdom, but on the other side the knowledge is on a
purely superficial level, and does not exist. Mars can also be
deeply impacted where either it will revolt as a villain or as a
spiritual warrior. The degree will play an important role here. If
Jupiter has the lowest degree, then it will be the saving grace for
this conjunction but mainly, the saving grace will be for others
because the native will benefit both ways. They will either plan
behind people's back or with people being involved in their plan.

## Mercury + Mars + Jupiter + Ketu conjunction:

When two twin-like planets which stand for blood, cuts, action,
fight, and army are in the same room with masters of intellect and
knowledge, it can produce a person who is a genius guru in the art
of war, or someone who has no clue about the battle they are
fighting due to lack of knowledge. The above two scenarios will
depend upon the planet that is winning the war here. If Ketu has
the highest degree, there would be a lot of impulsive and stupid
decisions that will be made and they will be implemented without
any knowledge or thought. If Jupiter has the lowest degree, then
Jupiter being the biggest planet will overshadow Ketu's ability to
eclipse the two planets. Ketu doesn't think; it's headless but its
nature is to be in the metaphysical realm rather than the physical

world. This is why it has the tendency to give quick results so it
can move on towards the top of the mountain. If the native applies
their skill in education leaning towards electronics, computers, and
medical science, they would excel. However, they'll need to work
on their communication skills which are not only harsh, but also
quite bitter at times. Mercury having the lowest degrees would be
the best situation here, so it can control all aspects of other planets.

## Mercury + Jupiter + Saturn + Rahu conjunction:

With a strict, disciplined, mind that has a craving for higher
knowledge and exotic topics, this can make for a very intelligent
person. They not only possess a quick thinking pattern filled with
all kinds of foreign ideas, but they are logical, practical, and the
native has the organization skills to put those ideas into motion.
Such conjunctions can be useful in accounting work, legal work,
and any kind of biology field. There is a great need and obsession
to learn about the environment and global conditions. Their
communication is quite organized, with a worldly desire to achieve
greatness; however, they are also very practical about their
optimistic plans.

## Mercury + Jupiter + Saturn + Ketu conjunction:

Even though the person is intelligent, knowledgeable, disciplined
and organized in their ideas, there is still a part of them that feels
lazy at times. They feel they have already have mastered the
subject they are learning from a previous birth. However, they still
prevail and make some of the best accountants, lawyers, and bio
mechanical researchers. Ketu loves to explore and research about
the truth. If Ketu has the highest degree, the native could have an
interest in any subject, like law, education, philosophy, and
business. They would try and find a sense of spirituality in what
they do. They believe by trying to find their soul in their work,
they will ultimately connect with the spirit of the universe.

## Venus + Mars + Jupiter + Saturn conjunction:

Pleasure, beauty, and creativity have tremendous energy, and with
will power, knowledge and discipline behind it, the native can rise
to the top. Venus receives the will to take action from Mars,
knowledge behind its creativity from Jupiter, and ability to be
disciplined, organized, and structured about a project from Saturn.
The native can reach the top of their profession in the arts, media,
design, fashion, and photography if Venus wins the conjunction
war. This conjunction can also produce a person who has a passion
for the world of chemicals, elements, earthy materials, and may do
very well as chemist, gemstone dealer, and even a professor of
science. The true career would be judged by sign placement, house
placement, and ascendant lord placement. Such planets can
provide quite a few options for the person. Whatever they do, they
bring creativity and discipline to the table and lots of wisdom from
their elders.

## Venus + Mars + Jupiter + Rahu conjunction:

The native's relationships are very dynamic and passionate, and
they usually love educated people from foreign lands. They get
involved in foreign religions. They find pleasure in traveling while
also learning about the higher philosophical quest for the soul. One
could also have passion and knowledge of weapons and aircrafts.
They will be an expert in the handling of sharp objects like knives
and needles. This also have an interest in dissecting humans and
animals. If Rahu has the highest degree, it can bring about a spouse
from foreign lands who might actually take advantage of the man
or woman if Jupiter or Venus is debilitated. They might also cause
harm if Mars holds the lowest degree, while Venus and Jupiter are
hemmed in between.

## Venus + Mars + Jupiter + Ketu conjunction:

This conjunction shows tremendous will power and passion to
attain higher spiritual goals. One may not agree with their gurus or
father, but they will still follow in the path of God and spirituality.
They would be inclined towards meditation, yoga, and settling in
isolated places if Ketu has the highest degree. If Jupiter has the
lowest degree, then it can provide a happy family life and a
spiritual spouse. There will always be some dissatisfaction due to
the malefic influence of Ketu and Mars, but Jupiter can be the
saving grace. One wants to be ranked in a higher place in the
military or police force. They feel they have the natural knowledge
of how to guide an army and they do it with pleasure.
Relationships with men or women would always have some issues
if Mars has the lowest degree. There would be a difference of
opinion and arguments with both men and women. Such a
conjunction in Scorpio can show a man or woman who might be
physically abused by their spouse. Eventually, the person finds
salvation in spiritual pursuits depending upon which house this
conjunction occurs in.

## Venus + Mars + Saturn + Rahu conjunction:

This is the heaviest dose for Venus. There is not only a cold,
distant relationship with the native’s spouse, but also one filled
with fire and flames. Due to lack of romance or lack of sexual
activity, one can find themselves trapped in a relationship. There
could be physical abuse by the spouse if Mars has the highest
degree, but if such a conjunction occurs in the ascendant, then the
native can abuse women physically as well. Rahu's amplification
of all the planetary qualities can bring about a very turbulent
relationship pattern. The native might fall in love with an older,
foreign woman, or a woman who might be mentally ill, or a
woman who could harm him physically. Such a conjunction is not
preferred in the 7th House unless Venus has the lowest degree
while in a good sign. No matter where Venus is placed, expect the

lowest degree. It will always be hemmed or supported by a
malefic. The best thing to do is to wait after the age of 36 to get
married when most of the planets will calm down and act with
more caution than impulse.

## Venus + Mars + Saturn + Ketu conjunction:

The conjunction is quite heavy on Venus because two planets that
are karakas of separation (Saturn and Ketu) are sitting with Venus.
This is where great disappointments can happen to the native in
love affairs in early life, but things change for such people if they
tie the knot after 35. Venus will always feel distant and dissatisfied
with the relationship it forms with other people. Not only will this
bring them the wrong type of people early in life, but it can also
harm the person psychologically due to too much malefic nature in
their spouse. For a man, this can show a woman who might take
advantage of him and leave. Such a conjunction in ascendant can
show a person who might take advantage of women. This is a great
conjunction for surgery, medical, and sports medicine. It can
produce a powerful athlete, dancer, and even a yoga teacher. If
Venus has the lowest degree, it would come out of the harsh
shadow of all three planets and prevail in mid-life. These natives
should marry late in life when people they come across become
better for them.

## Mars + Jupiter + Saturn + Rahu conjunction:

In this conjunction, Jupiter is feeling all the pressure. Jupiter is
also losing its positive qualities unless it has the lowest degree and
sits in a good sign like Cancer, Sagittarius, or Pisces. Here,
Jupiter's optimism is being greatly reduced in percentage. All
happy events in one’s life like graduation, marriage, birth of a
child, or job promotion may not look so exciting. They would
breeze through life not being able to feel great value in those
achievements. This native would also have a difference of opinion

with their teachers, professors, spiritual gurus, and fatherly figures.
They may not like following the law or rules if Rahu has the
highest degree and Mars with the lowest. Saturn and Jupiter both
are law abiding planets, so it can't be Saturn's fault. Saturn only
infuses his disciplined, practical, and strict personality upon the
happy Jupiter. This conjunction can produce a scientist, lawyer, or
engineer who takes his or her craft to foreign lands.

## Mars + Jupiter + Saturn + Ketu conjunction:

This conjunction can produce a very powerful spiritual teacher or
guru who has tremendous discipline and energy to learn all aspects
of religious and spiritual text. They may not agree with their
superiors, but they have their own values in the game of life and
afterlife. They can also be masters of the occult, engineers, or
researchers in the field of biology and chemistry. In the 8th House
and 12th House, psychic powers are given to the native and such
people make some of the best yoga teachers and athletes.
However, there can be great disappointments and lack of interest
in family, children, and friends. There is a great need to study in
isolated places to firmly get the grasp of their subjects. Such
people can also be very strict and harsh teachers or dictators. They
may not value life and find enjoyment in bloodshed. This would
happen if Mars has the lowest degree and Ketu has the highest.

## 5 planetary conjunctions:

Any conjunctions that contain more than 3 planets usually cause a
lot of confusion within a person, especially if the Sun and Moon
are involved. You must remember the rule of thumb here. First,
study the planets closest in conjunction, which will have the
greatest impact in the conjunction as a whole. Then, you move to
the second closest degree, third closest degree, and so on. You also

have to see which planet is winning the war of degree and sign,
which will again tell you who will cause the greatest impact upon
the conjunction. Once you know the two planets causing the
closest conjunction, go back to my two conjunction definitions and
bring it into your analysis.
I don't want to keep repeating the similar conjunctions over and
over again. I will simply write keywords and notes.

## Sun + Moon + Mercury + Venus + Mars conjunction:

The mind and personality are full of creativity, intelligence, drive
and aggressiveness. There is a great need to be charming and
comedic in life, while at the same time speaking loudly and
aggressively. This is a big personality that loves attention, unless
such a conjunction occurs in the 12th House while one of the
planets is in the lord ascendant. In this case, the native loves their
privacy, yet still enjoys coming out to party once in a while.

## Sun + Moon + Mercury + Venus + Jupiter conjunction:

This is probably one of the best conjunctions to have if it occurs in
the kendra or trikona houses. There is a great deal of optimism in
the mind and personality of the native. They feel like they can
achieve success in life without any hindrance. They are very peace
loving, gentle souls who only want to spread positivity, even if
such a conjunction occurs in the sign of Aries. There is great
pleasure in learning, preaching, and speaking. Everyone enjoys
their company and there is never a dull moment for the mind and
soul.

## Sun + Moon + Mercury + Venus + Saturn conjunction:

There is a great focus on work and creativity. As an artist, the
native will be well organized, structured, and disciplined regarding
their career. They speak in a charming and unique way, yet at the
same time they may come off a bit serious and cold. The native
may be a workaholic. Their mind is burdened, but not to a point of
depression, unless there are aspects reaching the Moon from other
corners of the chart. A majority of the time, the mind is quite
interested in creating structure, organizing, design, and art.

## Sun + Moon + Mercury + Venus + Rahu conjunction:

Emotions, intelligence, love, lust, and relationships are greatly
amplified in the native, and they want to consume it all
immediately. There is a great obsession with art, beauty, sex,
females, and flirting. If they are artists, they can become obsessed
by the object of their desire and creativity. As a writer, they would
dive into their subject 24 hours a day, 7 days a week, and will not
rest until everything is perfect. There can be many lies spread
between the native and their parents. There is pressure from the
mother to be perfect, and the parents could be harsh towards them.

## Sun + Moon + Mercury + Venus + Ketu conjunction:

This conjunction can cause a lot of psychological and mental
problems for the native; from depression and anxiety, to panic
attacks. The personality, mind, and intelligence would be greatly
affected by Ketu. The constant dissatisfaction from love and
relationships can hit a new low for the person, especially in the 1st,
6th, 8th and 12th House. If such a conjunction happens in the
ascendant, then the mind, body, and soul are all affected by the
south node. It can also make a person mystical and give them
knowledge of the occult, since that is what Ketu represents. This
can also inspire the individual to become a spiritual artist, singer,

or musician. They might dedicate their life to spirituality, being a
monk, or become an astrologer.

## Sun + Moon + Mercury + Mars + Saturn conjunction:

The personality of the native is very action oriented and all about
career. These guys are the shroud business men who will work 15-
20 hours a day and still not feel tired. They could be very
organized and structured about the actions they take and the
communication they create. Their mind is always on the go and
wants to thinking nothing but work. Such people have workaholic
parents. Even if mother is a housewife she wouldn't be able to find
enough time in the day do her work. The speech of the person is
very dominating and straight forward. They can say things that
would hurt other people and can cause separation from them. But,
this is also their positive quality in work and business. They tell it
like it is, they do not sugar code anything, they are able to clearly
see the problem and address to the right party, however, this type
of nature would only be passed down from their parents who
themselves are the same way and might have been abusive towards
the native, especially if the conjunction occurred in ascendant.

## Sun + Moon + Mercury + Mars + Rahu conjunction:

The personality of the native is very action oriented and all about
career. These guys are the shroud business men who want to work
less and make more. They could be very organized and structured
about the actions they take and the communication they create.
Their mind is always on the go and wants to thinking nothing but
work. Such people take action for self pleasure and worldly desire.
The parents could be travelers and might even instill bad habits
within the native like smoking and drinking. The speech of the
person is very dominating and straight forward but it can also be
deceiving. They do not have a problem lying especially if Rahu

has the highest degree and Mercury is weak by sign placement.
They can say things that would hurt other people and can cause
separation from them but such speech would only be for their own
profit and not for everyone's benefit. The mind is quite delusional
and may think of ideas that no other person has thought of but such
people can become original inventors in the field of technology,
computer, telecommunication and defense dept jobs and military,
however, this type of nature would only be passed down from their
parents who themselves were technical and pushed the native to
limit. Such people need to control their anger as they can burst into
flames any second.

## Sun + Moon + Mercury + Mars + Ketu conjunction:

The personality of the native is quite wicked, lost and might be full
of low self-esteem if Ketu eclipse the Sun. Ketu here gives
addiction to the mind like alcohol, guns, knives and hunting. But,
they also like to work alone in isolation and might even be robbers.
Such people are insensitive and may not have feelings towards
pain if Ketu has the highest degree while Moon is hemmed
between Mars and Ketu. Their speech might be problematic and
they may stutter when speaking. The intelligence is very sharp and
quick regarding calculation but depending upon which nakshatra
Mercury or Moon are placed in it will show if Ketu effects the
native in positive or negative way. Such people do not have
attachment to their work or family. They also have disputes with
their father and mother. Due to family problems they can run into
sever depression and anxiety.

## Sun + Moon + Venus + Jupiter + Saturn conjunction:

The personality of the person is very much focused on issues of the
community and government, especially after their late 20's. They

have tremendous respect for their father and mother because
through their knowledge and discipline, the native shines bright
like Venus in the fields of fashion, food, art, and cinema. But, if
Saturn has the lowest degree and Jupiter has the highest degree,
then it can push them towards more government work and the field
of law. Their spouse is very mature and religious. They will expect
a lot from them, and would want them to be as organized in life as
they are. If Venus is debilitated, the person can have issues with
cleanliness, but they will be very particular in terms of love affairs
and relationships.

## Sun + Moon + Venus + Jupiter + Rahu conjunction:

If Rahu holds the highest degree, it can show a charlatan who sells
snake oil as a cure for cancer, because the Moon and Sun which
shows the purity of soul and mind are being eclipsed by darkness;
while two gurus (Venus and Jupiter) are also losing their positive
grace. This can make a person run in the wrong crowd where they
learn the criminal side of life. If Jupiter has the lowest degree, then
such a person can also be a great scholar who may be a son of
preacher, or grows up in a religious family, especially if this
conjunction occurs in the 9th House. Rahu loves to learn and
becomes obsessed with things related to his horoscope. When 3
satwic planets come into his realm, he is forced to learn the
spiritual side of life even if he doesn't want to.

## Sun + Moon + Venus + Jupiter + Ketu conjunction:

This conjunction mostly produces a person who may follow the
path of a yogi after mid-life. Even though Ketu may eclipse the
Sun and Moon, due to presence of Jupiter, Ketu becomes a moksha
karaka planet and it leads the individual to the path of spirituality,
including occult knowledge. The spouse of the native would be
very intelligent, spiritual, and may also possess a natural ego.
Spouses can come from banking, finance, or the government
sector. It all depends upon which planet is closest to Venus. The

mind here is a mixed bag. They are positive, eccentric, and can be
depressed. Their depressive nature tends to slow down after mid-
life where maturity takes over and depression becomes only a
small part of life. Such people make great spiritual leaders and
professors.

## Sun + Moon + Venus + Saturn + Rahu conjunction:

The Sun here is brightening up the qualities of all planets if Rahu
doesn't eclipse him by having the highest degree. Saturn will put
discipline, organization skills, and worth ethic upon all planets.
The ego is blown up due to their creativity and work ethic, but
such people may lack compassion for others who work hard. The
mind is constantly involved with work and bringing structure into
their work life and home life. Such qualities might have been a
lesson given from their parents due to involvement of the Sun and
Moon.

## Sun + Moon + Venus + Saturn + Ketu conjunction:

The personality of the native desires creative self expression. They
are very organized and disciplined when working on their creative
pursuits. They feel this constant dissatisfaction from their work,
and work twice as hard to perfect it. The mind is constantly
battling between being creative and depressed. They seek
creativity to run away from depression but their own talent can
bring them down due to lack of satisfaction. The man in this case
would and should marry late, and they will marry someone who is
mature, spiritual, and dominating. Such qualities may not be taken
well by the native, however, marrying someone of this nature late
in life would be far more tolerable than in their 20's.

## Sun + Mercury + Venus + Mars + Jupiter conjunction:

This is a very positive conjunction that can bring about great
creative and communicative talent in a person. Such people usually
make it to the top of the ladder in the corporate world. This is
because their ability to communicate and implement ideas are
sharp and more informative than their peers. This is a great
conjunction for excellent management skills in accounting,
finance, and even government work. If Venus wins the war, then
creative work will be far more visible than routine. If Venus is
hemmed between the Sun and Mars degree, then such people have
a troubled married life filled with tempers and arguments. The
spouse of the native would be very high ranking in the work place
along with being well educated and creative.

## Sun + Mercury + Venus + Mars + Saturn conjunction:

The marriage of the native can suffer from verbal and physical
abuse like cuts, burns, and accidents. Most relationships for the
native can turn sour in life, including the ones with their family.
Although there is a need for structure, organization, and discipline
in a relationship, things somehow go haywire without warning. A
nice, simple, and peaceful encounter can suddenly turn into a war
zone. There may be a tendency to get married early, but it could
lead to a divorce if the native is not careful about who they are
selecting. Waiting until the late 20's to pick the right partner is
best; especially when Mars’ energy has calm down. Focusing on
studies may be difficult because Mercury is in a war zone with
Mars and Saturn. If Mercury is strong, then the native can become
an engineer.

## Sun + Mercury + Venus + Mars + Rahu conjunction:

There is amplification of passion, sexual orientation, flirtation, and
charm. Charisma and artistry have a foreign, unusual, and exotic
elements. There is great interest in languages, foreign travel, and
one may fall in love with a foreigner who might be very sensual. A

man with such a conjunction is attracted to exotic, seductive, and
sexual women. The personality of the native would be somewhat
of a player, especially in 1st, 5th, 7th, 8th, 11th and 12th House.
These folks tackle education and communication with aggression
and may make impulsive decision regarding their learning. They
make pick the wrong subjects or majors for their career and later
have to change them especially in Rahu mahadasha, because Rahu
here is misguiding the mind, soul, learning, and relationship
aspect.

## Sun + Mercury + Venus + Mars + Ketu conjunction:

This creates a mechanism for great dissatisfaction with sports,
love, relationships, and communication because one’s identity is
lost. There is a need to express thoughts through life experiences,
and Ketu makes it happen through the art form of Venus. The
person might love computer programming, electronics, special
effects, and the occult. They have a great interest in the mystical
side of life which eventually becomes a source of pleasure. They
may not be big on sports unless such a conjunction occurs in 1st,
3rd, 6th and 10th House where Mars gains more strength. There is
a lack of passion expressed by the native because passion is more
of an idea than a feeling.

## Sun + Mercury + Venus + Jupiter + Saturn conjunction:

This conjunction brings a great deal of power and knowledge upon
the native who uses their authority to bring about discipline,
structure, and organization into their educational side of life.
Education can come from many different avenues, like art, acting,
law, spirituality, and the bio medical field. These people not only
have a great imagination and ideas but they are able to gather all
the right knowledge about those ideas and organize them in a
beautiful manner. Saturn here can also bring about delay in

marriage until after 28, especially if Saturn and Venus are close in
degrees.

## Sun + Mercury + Venus + Jupiter + Rahu conjunction:

This conjunction mostly impacts the communicative style of the
native along with relationships they form. There is a great
amplification of charm in this personality. They love to
communicate with others, especially mature and foreign people.
They are very romantic and sensual, and tend to not follow the
crowd in religious beliefs. They are simply very balanced in their
approach to life. Jupiter adds the interest of pleasure in higher
knowledge and written religious text while Rahu gives them
tremendous interest in foreign places and foreign cultures. This
mix also gets brightened by the Sun, and makes them quite
interesting people who engage themselves with foreign matters.

## Sun + Mercury + Venus + Jupiter + Ketu conjunction:

This conjunction is inclined more towards a search for perfection
in life due to frustration from worldly matters. Such people may be
very self critical about their image and their relationships. They
want perfection from others and if they don't get it, they move on.
Due to the presence of 3 spiritual masters (Sun, Jupiter, and Ketu)
the charm and artistic pursuits tend to dive towards the empty side
of life. They might be charming one minute and critical the next;
leading them to fewer friendships in mid-life. If Ketu has the
lowest degrees, then such people come out very optimistic and
positive in life yet spiritual. Their sense of happiness and pleasure
will ultimately come through following the path of spirituality, but
Ketu doesn't invoke his good qualities until after the age of 42.
Slowly the person starts to find interest in the occult and spiritual
world.

## Sun + Venus + Mars + Jupiter + Saturn conjunction:

Venus is not only hemmed between malefics, but it also receives a
friendly supporting role from Jupiter. However, Jupiter still
considers Venus his enemy. Marriage for both sexes would have a
good number of ups and downs since both wife (Venus) and
husband (Jupiter) are present in the war zone of Mars and Saturn.
There is lot of passion and desire in the native for art, love, lust,
knowledge, religion, and philosophy. There is also a destructive
side within the native. They might be self destructive, or run into
people who are this way. There is a possibility of having a delayed
marriage if there is less than a 10 degree difference between Venus
and Saturn. This is especially true for men.

## Sun + Venus + Mars + Jupiter + Rahu conjunction:

There could be many arguments for the native at the workplace
about science, religion, God, sports, wars, and politics. There
could also be arguments with their spouse or significant other. The
reason for this behavior is simple; all the planets represented are
now coming in the eclipse of Rahu. Rahu is opposed to most of
the planets in this conjunction, while at the same time amplifying
the negative energy of those planets. Since the Sun is the karaka of
career, the native will get into arguments with people at work for
unnecessary reasons. They will especially argue with their father.
The native would not believe in gurus, teachers, religion,
philosophy, or rituals so easily. They usually improve after their
mid-thirties, when the body, mind, and soul become mature. Rahu
will try to put his own foreign ratification upon other planets. The
native would like to define their own religion or belief system,
their own way of playing sports and games, their own version of
how a relationship should be, and how they work with others.

## Sun + Venus + Mars + Jupiter + Ketu conjunction:

There is great dissatisfaction with things related to all planets
except Ketu, as it is the source of this feeling. The native may be
dissatisfied with their spouse, love, relationship, work, sports,
energy, knowledge, teachers, gurus, or father. They are unable to
figure out why so many aspects of their life are always bringing
dissatisfaction. However, if Jupiter is well placed, then spirituality
is unleashed and a path towards moksha will be of great interest.
There is separation from things related to the house where such a
conjunction occurs. If Ketu holds the lowest degree, then most of
the dissatisfaction would be nullified, and only small amount
would remain.

## Sun + Venus + Mars + Saturn + Rahu conjunction:

When you have 4 natural malefic hovering around Venus,
relationships of all kinds will feel like a tremendous burden upon
the native. Here the soft Venus is dealing with fire, air, and an
eclipse at the same time. Such people might have a tendency to
abuse their spouse physically or psychologically, depending upon
which planet has the lowest degree and who is winning the war.
They are very confused about the type of partner they want to be
with because this conjunction brings several types of partners.
They get involved with foreigners, mature older partners, and
partners who are very head strong with strong will power. Such a
conjunction provides far better results if the native waits after the
age of 35 to get married because Mars and Saturn calm down
tremendously by that age. However, if Venus is in its own sign or
sign of exaltation, then there would be far more happiness from the
spouse compared to other sign placements.

## Sun + Venus + Mars + Saturn + ketu conjunction:

This has quite a similar result to the conjunction before, but now
Venus is quite dissatisfied with relationships formed with the

opposite sex. Such people can find addiction in sex like a porn star
or prostitute. If Venus is combust it can show sexual abuse at
young age which would shape their belief regarding love and sex.
This is an excellent conjunction for spiritual pursuits after the age
of 35, but these natives can expect several relationships in their
lifetime because Ketu gives the tendency to be dissatisfied with all
aspects of love and pushes the person towards finding love through
spirituality. Here, you want Venus to be in its own sign, exaltation
sign, and have the lowest degrees as long as it's not combust. In
such a situation the native would overcome all the malefic effects
and be well settled in life on time.

## Sun + Venus + Jupiter + Saturn + Rahu conjunction:

The personality of the person is becoming very charming, mature,
full of wisdom and worldly knowledge. Such people have
tremendous discipline and work ethics to learn all kinds of
knowledge including knowledge about other cultures. They are
very creative in art and science and when they do work their way
of working is out of the box and maybe taboo breaking. They will
seek knowledge which would be outside the confines of society.
They can make great sex psychologist scientists if Jupiter has the
lowest degree along with Rahu having the highest. The person will
pursue artist work in the mahadaha of Venus. The wife for the
male native would be from different culture or cast and may even
be from foreign lands, but, she would have lot of knowledge about
the world including biology. She could also be a attorney. The
husband, too, can be a attorney or working in the field of alw, bio
mechanical scientist or government worker.

## Sun + Venus + Jupiter + Saturn + Ketu conjunction:

There could be a great disconnect with the material world and
people inside. The native would find pleasure and luxury in
following the path of a yogi and spirituality. Saturn, Jupiter and

Sun are highly spiritual planets while Venus and Jupiter are gurus
in our life. Ketu, having the highest degree can take the native to
occult or spiritual practice after being greatly disappointed with
material things and relationship in their life. if Venus or Jupiter
have the lowest degree or Ketu has the lowest degree then the
spouse for both male and female would be spiritual but not
detached. Such people can have great disappointments with their
spiritual gurus and father in the early stages of life but with
maturity they will accept spiritual guidance. Such people should
not marry young as they will run into partners that are wrong for
them.

## Sun + Mars + Jupiter + Saturn + Rahu conjunction:

There is a great impact upon the native's father, and ability to
sustain a stable career. Both the Sun and Saturn, which are the
karakas of work are being impacted by Rahu. Rahu is amplifying
energy of all the planets in this conjunction, while the Sun is
brightening up the energy of the planets for negative reasons. The
knowledge base of the native can be exposed to different aspects
of life. There is a great interest in engineering, especially computer
engineering or civil engineering. The native can also become a
builder of commercial real estate. This conjunction can give great
results in the 3rd, 6th and 10th House which are the battleground
houses for the native, and places where they have to prove their
worth.

## Sun + Mars + Jupiter + Saturn + Ketu conjunction:

This conjunction can produce an unorganized, wild, and eccentric,
personality who will learn whatever they want versus what society
tells them. They will follow the laws they like, and they will be
disciplined only if they feel like it. Most of the time, their energy
is drained due to lack of motivation or dissatisfaction with what
they are doing. Since both karakas of career, the Sun and Saturn,
are present in Ketu's space, there is a great need to keep

revaluating one's purpose in life. Whatever work they take up, they
do it with great enthusiasm, but it fizzle's out quickly and there is
nothing left but questions that need answering. They will
occasionally try to seek spiritual guidance from gurus, but they
dislike the pattern of discipline that is required to understand the
true nature of spirituality or religion. The native has the urge to
explore the brutal side of life involving blood, flesh, and pain. This
can eventually lead them to become a wrestler, boxer or
professional fighter. Ketu's disconnect with the world and material
body makes them less emotional about inflicting pain on others.

## Moon + Mercury + Venus + Mars + Jupiter conjunction:

The mind of this individual has multiple personalities. On one end
the mind is artistic, intellectual and charming, while on the other
hand it runs to bite the one who annoys them psychologically.
Such people love the company of others who provide guidance and
protection to them. When the native decides to do something or set
a goal in their mind, they not only analyze that goal with great
detail, but also gather all the knowledge required to make that goal
happen. However, with such planning also comes impulsivity to
achieve the goal. This can lead to a personality that has all the right
tools in mind but is not patient enough to implement them in the
real world. In terms of relationships, the person will be with
someone who is a loud mouth, energetic, and sexual, and also has
the desire for higher knowledge.

## Moon + Mercury + Venus + Mars + Saturn conjunction:

The native's mind is full of creative ideas and has the will to
implement those ideas, but, now they have to wait and be patient to
get those ideas out in the real world. They have the ability to
organize, structure, and focus on each idea, but they also have the
nature not listen to other people and do what they think is the best

solution. There is great need to explore and investigate ideas, to
take them apart, and see if everything needed has been put into the
project. This conjunction also shows someone who might be a
great architect, where the need for creativity and engineering gives
the native an extra edge on others. This conjunction however can
lead to a war zone with opposite sex. If Venus' degree is hemmed
between the degrees of Mars and Saturn, then there could be
physical and sexual abuse. If Mercury, Venus, and Mars are in
tight degrees then it can also lead to verbal abuse by spouse.

## Moon + Mercury + Venus + Mars + Rahu conjunction:

This conjunction can be a blessing and curse from the universe.
The mind is quick, intelligent, and has exotic thoughts. Such
thoughts can also lead to a very dark side of life if Rahu has the
highest degree while the Moon's degree is hemmed between Mars
and Rahu. The mind is again full of creative ideas and need for
sexual pleasure, but such pleasure can also lead a person to trouble
with their great obsession and passion towards such things. A man
can have such a strong fantasy or obsession about a woman that it
can lead to stalking, especially if the Moon and Venus' degree are
hemmed between Mars and Rahu. If the native has normality in the
mind, then it can call for a great artist, writer, and sculpture. They
have an imagination that might be out of this world, which can
make for a great science fiction author, military engineer,
computer engineer, 3D graphic designer, and animator. These
natives are great with computer and electronic engineering.

## Moon + Mercury + Venus + Mars + Ketu conjunction:

This conjunction can lead to mastery over creativity and
communication, but such talent will also be followed by great
dissatisfaction with those things. The native might be a great
singer, artist, or actor but their need to prove their talent may not

be there; which can make a person humble and down to earth, but
it can also make them walk away from their talents. The native
will
also
feel
great
agony
from
dissatisfaction
and
miscommunication with their spouse. Although the spouse might
have all the ingredients of a perfect mate, there would still be some
ticking that will feel like an empty hole. If Ketu has the lowest
degree, then it can lead to mastering creativity, imagination, and
ability to fight, while the shock of being dissatisfied would be
much less. Such a conjunction in 2nd, 8th and 12th House brings
about addiction for alcohol, drugs, and sexual activity.

## Moon + Venus + Mars + Jupiter + Saturn conjunction:

There is a great need for artistic and sexual expression with
discipline, organization and work ethic. There is a energy and
wisdom when they perform. They bring about natural sexual
energy when they are in their element. This conjunction can
produce good and bad results depending upon the sign placement,
but such people will overcome bad events because even if one
planet is debilitated, they would most likely get a neecha banga
raja yoga support from the other planets. Moon, Mars, Jupiter and
Saturn debilitation would get canceled here due to each other's
presence. They make great lawyers, judges and people working on
the administrative side of government, along with police officers
and soldiers.

## Moon + Venus + Mars + Jupiter + Rahu conjunction:

The personality and mind of the individual is very extravagant due
to the influence of Rahu and Venus, both of whom seek worldly
pleasure. They have a very flamboyant personality that takes
charge of matters in a social network. These folks have a lot of
passion for pleasure, food, traveling, and even alcohol. Such a
conjunction can also bring in a lot of wealth due to Rahu
amplifying Venus and Jupiter's energy. Even though Rahu takes

away the positive quality of Jupiter, it still amplifies the nature of
Jupiter and Venus; this mean the wealth may not be from a sound
source, but it will be in huge deposits. The wife of the native
would be very educated and beautiful, but from a different religion
or culture; the same goes for a woman as Jupiter shows the
husband. The creativity of the person comes out in this conjunction
because Venus finds lots of energy to showcase her talent.

## Moon + Venus + Mars + Jupiter + Ketu conjunction:

The can be quite a mixed bag for the person's psyche. They have
lots of passion in life for sports, beauty, and yoga while also taking
part in educational pursuits. However, there are quite a few times
when pursuing their passion turns cold and dry; a time when they
just want to walk away. This is because Ketu, during its maha,
antar and pratyantar dasha can suddenly show lack of interest in
such things. Their actions are not only impulsive, but also towards
creative and educational pursuits. If Jupiter has the lowest degree it
can provide great optimism and hope for their goals, even if Ketu
has the highest degree. But, if Ketu has the highest and Mars has
the lowest degree, then it can be quite an aggressive and physically
daunting conjunction.

## Moon + Mars + Jupiter + Saturn + Rahu conjunction:

In this conjunction the Moon feels a lot of pressure even though
it's with Jupiter. This is because it is 3 against 2; 3 malefic planets
against 2 benefic planets. Now, if the Moon is waning in this case,
then the Moon will feel even more pressure from both sides,
including Jupiter, because all Jupiter will be doing is expanding
the Moon's emotions. As I mentioned, the waning moon is not a
very positively charged moon in terms of emotions. The mother
would be a great disciplinarian and may even physically abuse the
native.

## Moon + Mars + Jupiter + Saturn + Ketu conjunction:

The personality and internal mind of the person will be full of
turmoil. Even though Jupiter's presence saves them from sinking
all the way down, they still happen to feel depressed, especially if
Moon is waning in their horoscope. There might be pressure from
the native’s brother, bosses, work, and their gurus which will take
them into isolation and depression. The mother of the native would
also be good and bad at the same time. She would not only provide
nourishment, but also show discipline, a harsh attitude, and may
even be away from the native due to work or other circumstances.
However, they need to control their impulsive behavior regarding
major decisions in their life, especially work and education related.
They have lot of unpredictable anger due to the abrupt nature of
Mars and Ketu. Jupiter might actually blow it out of proportion.

## Mercury + Venus + Mars + Jupiter + Saturn conjunction:

The intelligence of the native is structured, organized and craves
for more knowledge. Such craving will also bring about a very
aggressive speech style where use of knowledge and ability to
organize one's speech can lead to arrogance and a very powerful
individual who wants to bring down everyone in a conversation.
These people can take all aspects of life and learn the things they
need to in order to please the other. Mercury is getting its creative
ideas from Venus, the energy to take upon those ideas from Mars,
gathering information and knowledge regarding those ideas from
Jupiter, and ability to organize those ideas from Saturn. Such an
individual has a very sharp memory and can recall all events in
their life, especially if Mercury has the lowest degree. Even though
the marriage of the native will be delayed, they will get a spouse
just as sharp as they are, unless Venus is hemmed between Mars
and Saturn, or debilitated, then spouse can lack such qualities.

## Mercury + Venus + Mars + Jupiter + Rahu conjunction:

The intelligence of the person can be very sharp and they may be
obsessed with gaining knowledge. They have a keen interest in
knowledge of other cultures and foreign places. They might also
take up interest in surgery, science, or medicine. If Venus is the
strongest in the conjunction, then such person can be a very
dramatic actor with a message. The native takes upon the beauty of
other cultures and implements it in their own life and hometown.
They usually attract a very strong personality for a mate, and the
wife or husband might come from foreign lands, culture, or
religion. Rahu here will make them question all aspects of their life
and it will make them crave more of what they already have. Such
a placement of planets with Rahu can drive a person to madness
because they just can't be satisfied.
Mercury + Venus + Mars + Jupiter + Ketu conjunction
There is an evolution of mixed results that are occurring in this
conjunction. On one hand the person has amplification of great
knowledge, pleasure through learning, and passion for their
spouse. At the same time, they can suddenly feel an urge for
something different in life and relationships. Even though the
personality of the native is quite soothing, pleasing, and filled with
great energy, they can also suddenly show a cold shoulder. They
have many days filled with confusion and frustration due to not
being able to find a solution for their problems. The husband of a
female might be physically abusive or may not have such a great
interest in her if Ketu is closer to Jupiter, where a man would not
be able to find such interest in their spouse if Ketu is closer to
Venus.
Mercury + Venus + Mars + Saturn + Rahu conjunction

Venus is in a really in a tight spot in this planetary conjunction
section, but what's happening now is that Mercury is also
bothering Venus. There is a great deal of misunderstanding in the
native's love life and the communication they have with others.
Such a conjunction can bring a delay of marriage which would be
a good thing for the native. The spouse will be highly powerful
and will demand or crave control in the relationships where the
native themselves will want a control. This can lead to fights if
marriage occurs early on in life. Such people can have a beautiful
marriage with an organized, passionate, and foreign spouse if it
happens after the age of 36. Saturn is playing a neutral card. Saturn
is bringing the cold and harsh reality of relationships to Venus.
Saturn is also bringing a mature, organized, and structured spouse
later in life. This doesn't deny marriage, but could bring trouble if
married early.

## Mercury + Venus + Mars + Saturn + Ketu conjunction:

There is a great confusion within the native to think and analyze
situations because sometimes the intellect is impulsive and takes
radical action, while at other times the intellect slows down too
much and can't remember the idea. The analytical side of the
person is sharp at times and dull at others. If Saturn is closer to
Mercury than Mars, the person will have great discipline to focus
on work, organize ideas, and structure their blue print for any
project. Mars would provide the will power to achieve those
things. With Ketu being mixed in the conjunction with Venus, the
planet of desire, the native may not have a desire for goals or they
would find disappointment from the result of their work. This can
lead to great self criticism which may eventually lead the
individual into isolation from siblings and romantic relationships.
If Ketu has the highest degree while Mercury is near Ketu, then it
can also affect the common sense of the person. Such people might
be cold in their marriage or the spouse themselves will be cold and

unromantic. On a positive note, they make great computer
programmers, engineers, and car mechanics. They achieve a lot of
success because they do not crave it.

## Mercury + Mars + Jupiter + Saturn + Rahu conjunction:

In this conjunction the intelligence of a person is sharp like a
sword. They are able to pull up words and quotes from their past
and have the great ability to think quickly and bring about useful
ideas. Their knowledge base is very organized and structured,
however, if Rahu and Mercury are near each other along with
Saturn, then such a person may also have a delay in speech. They
may have unnecessary illusions or delays in their intelligence. But,
the speech is sharp and to the point later on in life. Such people are
very mature in their intelligence and speech style, unless the
conjunction happens in Gemini, then such a person would talk too
much at times like a child, while at other times would be
completely mute. Due the energy of mixed planets, there are
eccentric results.

## Mercury + Mars + Jupiter + Saturn + Ketu conjunction:

Intelligence of the native is again sharp, organized, structured, and
disciplined, but there is also a great dissatisfaction from using
one’s communication skills. One wants to write in isolation to
communicate if Ketu has the highest degree. They may become
technical writers, computer engineers, programmers, and even
research scientists. Although the ideas are full of chaotic patterns,
they eventually get organized and implemented into the real world.
Such people make good writers or talk about unusual things or
foreign objects. They can also make great investigative journalists.

## Venus + Mars + Jupiter + Saturn + Rahu conjunction:

Venus being the softest planet gets the most impact. Love and
relationships are usually occurring with people of a very
dominating nature who are of a fatherly or motherly figure. They
come to the aid of the native like an old wizard, but that wizard is
an illusion of Rahu, and may misguide the native in their path to
love. Such people run into quite a few con men and fakers who
may use them and take advantage of them physically and sexually.
Such natives attract quite unusual personalities, especially from
foreign lands. There is a great pressure on Venus even by Jupiter
here because Jupiter won't let Venus have pleasure her way; he
would infuse his own laws and rules upon her. The sensual
pleasure would only be enjoyed if the native is trying to gain
higher education, religious texts, or long distance travel. There is
quite a bit of obsession with travel here because Saturn shows
separation from homeland, Jupiter shows long distance travel, and
Rahu also shows foreign places; while Mars is the engine and
passion that brings great drive within Venus to take impulsive trips
around the world.

## Venus + Mars + Jupiter + Saturn + Ketu conjunction:

This conjunction has a similar effect to the previous conjunction,
only now Venus travels to seek isolation and is running away from
the material world. Due to Venus being surrounded by strict
learning, boot camp type roommates, it completely loses track of
its own significance. Here Venus tries its best to enjoy sensual
pleasure, especially love and relationships, but none prevail in
early life. Early on in life the native would have lots of passion for
traveling and enjoying life, but as the coldness of Saturn sets in
from constant setbacks, there is now a great need to look within
and find pleasure with thyself; as in spirituality, meditation, and
yoga. This conjunction shows someone who might be a yoga
teacher, especially in the sign of Pisces. But Jupiter is also being
hemmed by malefic, hence it is also losing its positive quality and
becoming far more serious about life than the natural optimistic
planet that it is. After the age of 35, there are very good results.

## 6 Planetary conjunctions:

These conjunctions are rare, but they do happen. There is no real
definition for any conjunction over three planets, because so many
energies are mashing in together, and so many houses are
involved, that it can create a clustering mess. Such conjunctions
are even harder to understand when they occur in the ascendant,
because the native's personality will be so versatile that it would be
hard to define. Even in other houses, you still have the most
important elements of personality which are the Sun, Moon, and
Mercury together. There is no finite answer. The best way to study
such a conjunction is taking them apart piece by piece. You look at
the conjunction closest to each other, and you read them regarding
certain aspects of their life. If you want to study marriage, then
study Venus and its conjunction with the closest planet or planets.
If you want to study the wealth of the native, then study Jupiter
and its closest conjunction.
It is nearly impossible to have all planets in tight conjunction and
in the same nakshatra. This is considered to be more like a
restaurant than a house. In a restaurant, you have separate groups
of people at separate tables, but none are relating to each other and
none are talking to each other. However, they are aware of each
other’s presence. This is how a 6 planetary conjunction is studied.
Sun + Moon + Mercury + Venus + Mars + Jupiter +

## Saturn conjunction:

Sun + Moon + Mercury + Venus + Mars + Jupiter + Rahu

## conjunction:

Sun + Moon + Mercury + Venus + Mars + Jupiter + Ketu

## conjunction:

Since most of the planets are together, we only have 3 pairs to talk
about. I will give a basic brief description because there is not one
single answer for such a scenario. These conjunctions are bringing
all the houses' energy together into one house; from the ascendant
lord to the 12th lord ruler. You have studied all the conjunctions in
the book, and the best way to analyze this would be to go back and
read the conjunction of the pair which is closest to each other.
They could be two planets, three planets, or four planets. Once you
have studied that, look at what mahadasha the individual is
running, including the antra dasha. Those two planets will be the
only important planets that one needs to see because they are fully
activated and the houses they rule are fully activated. Since the
native needs to know what will be happening currently in their life
or in the near future, it's best to study those two planets as part of
the conjunction. One thing is certain; all experiences of life will be
through one house.
To get a better analysis of the native's personality, one should
study the 64th divisional chart. The mahadasha planets will have
more say than all other planets with respect to career.

## 7 Planetary conjunctions:

Again, when studying 6 or 7 planetary conjunction, you first want
to study the closest conjunctions in degree, the house they rule,
and the sign they are placed in. After such analysis, you want to
move towards the house they are placed in. This provides a great
deal of information about the native. When you have 95% of all
planets in the same house, the best way to judge such a
conjunction is through mahadasha and antar dasha periods,
because those are the planets which will be most active during that
time.

Sun + Moon + Mercury + Venus + Mars + Jupiter +

## Saturn + Rahu conjunction:

## Saturn + Ketu conjunction:

## Uranus & Neptune conjunction:

Although these two planes are not mentioned in the original text of
Prashara (Hindu astrology), they were discovered in the Nadi text
in South India where ancient mystics believed that three planets
would be discovered late in human history, and they would
contribute in a malefic manner upon human behavior. This is why
I am including the conjunction of Neptune and Uranus with other
planets. As much I want to include Pluto, it never made sense in
my test studies. I am willing to give Uranus and Neptune a chance
as they do shed some light upon the native's behavior, but Pluto
has to be put in a box for now. What people think Pluto is doing in
your horoscope is simply an aspect or conjunction of other planets
that would easily explain the event.
Neptune: This planet represents unconditional love, illusions, and
delusions. Depending on where Neptune is placed in our
horoscope, we tend to unconditionally love without any logic or
reasoning; even if the things related to that house might hurt us, we
still fall without any safety net. Neptune represents our mystical,
mysterious, and inspirational dreams. It is our vision of a perfect
world which does not exist. This is why Neptune is malefic; it
sidetracks us from logic and reasoning.
Neptune does not control any sign. In other words, it doesn't have
lordship over any zodiac sign in the sky. Many western astrology

lovers would say Pisces is controlled by Neptune, but if you read
the roots of original astrology, you would have a different
perspective. Jupiter is the only controller of Pisces. Neptune,
however, feels very comfortable in Pisces as well. Neptune in a
way is exalted in Pisces, even though there really isn't any
exaltation and debilitation point for Neptune or Uranus. Pisces is a
mirror image of Neptune, which shows imagination, dreams,
unconditional love, and spirituality. When we judge Neptune, we
should look at the sign placement and house placement to
determine the impact it has in our birth chart.
Currently, I can conclude that Neptune only aspects the 7th place
from itself because I haven't really found any rock solid evidence
of Neptune or Uranus having 5th, 7th, and 9th aspect as some
suggest. However, maybe after further testing, my conclusion will
shift.
Uranus: Uranus brings sudden revolution and transformation into
the house he sits in. Uranus is the great thunder bold of Zeus. In
today's day and age, Uranus can show equipment running on
electricity, the internet, fiber optic communication, and physics.
Uranus is our rebellious and eccentric nature. This planet is truly a
malefic, as it can suddenly make a Hitler out of Gandhi. This is a
very scientific planet that also relies upon mystic and occult
powers to invent a solution.

## Neptune + Sun conjunction:

The Sun brightens the quality of all planets he sits with. When the
Sun is in conjunction with Neptune, our dream world and mystical
visions are glaring bright. We become aware of our delusions and
dreams. The Sun helps you see Neptune for what it is and enjoy it.
At the same time, it also increases the ability to love those things
unconditionally.

## Neptune + Moon conjunction:

Our mind is filled with vivid dreams and visions of the future. We
become extremely artistic and spiritual about what we experience
in the house where such a conjunction is occurring. This can make
for a brilliant fantasy writer, screenplay writer, or children's book
author. These careers are strong possibilities if the conjunction
occurs in the 1st, 3rd, 5th, 8th and 12th House of the birth chart.
We also have unconditional love towards our mother since the
Moon represents the mother in astrology. This conjunction can
also make the mind delusional, or may make the native see things
which aren't really there or from another world.

## Neptune + Mercury conjunction:

This could be a troublesome conjunction because our logic,
intelligence, and analytics can be dissolved with the wavy and
dreamy Neptune. Intelligence will move towards creativity and the
mystical side of life. Our ability to memorize a math or science
problem becomes far more difficult compared to dreams and ideas.

## Neptune + Venus conjunction:

When two planets representing love come in conjunction, it can
create a true hopeless romantic. These people fall in love without
any reasoning or logic because they want to fall in love for the
sake of it. They enjoy the idea of being in a relationship and
experiencing true intimacy without any reasoning. Such people
make great artists and actors because their creativity is driven by a
very mystical and dreamy point of view,

## Neptune + Mars conjunction:

This is another dangerous conjunction as our behavior can be
based on illusion and a false sense of security. Mars, which
represents action, fighting ability, will power, and anger, can
suddenly find its motivation through dreams and illusion. Our
ability to defend ourselves and fight for what's right is based on
what we think is real, whereas with Neptune, it may be all a dream.
Such people may get angry or get into fight based on false
pretenses or wrong information.

## Neptune + Jupiter conjunction:

This is a mixed conjunction, where results are neutral. Both Jupiter
and Neptune represent spirituality and diving into the mystical side
of life in the 12th House, or sign of Pisces. Both promote
unconditional love, and the search for truth. However, they differ
when Jupiter brings his practical and logical ability to acquire
knowledge and truth about God, and Neptune provides its
reasoning through dreams and visions. This can make a very good
spiritual guide, or someone who promotes peace and love in the
world. Such a conjunction in 8th and 12th House can bring strong
intuition in astrology, tarot, and physics.

## Neptune + Saturn conjunction:

When Neptune and Saturn come into conjunction, our ability to
organize and be structured in life is lost in our imagination and
spiritual reasoning. Saturn can limit our ability to unconditionally
love things in our life, our dreams, and our ideas related to the
house where this conjunction occurs. On a positive note, Saturn
represents our ability to work hard towards something. When in
conjunction with Neptune, we can work hard towards bringing our

dreams, visions, and spiritual side of life into reality This
conjunction can make for a great mystic, healer, or spiritual guide.

## Neptune + Rahu conjunction:

This conjunction can produce a brilliant science fiction author,
film director, or any kind of a story teller. These two realms of
space, mystery, and unusual places can take the author's
imagination into place where not too many minds have been
before. If the Moon is with this conjunction, it can also create a
schizophrenic person.

## Neptune + Ketu conjunction:

When two planets representing search for spirituality come
together there is a great need to get away from the world of reality
and into the sub-atomic reality of our inner self. But since Ketu
doesn't care for conditional love and imagination, it makes
Neptune feel quite dissatisfied from the love it gives and receives.
The native's imagination and love only feels comfort when
searching for the truth about its own existence, when searching for
the source energy and when the mind is heading towards
enlightenment. This energy of Neptune and Ketu can produce a
very powerful occultist, master of tantric and, if Moon or Venus is
with this conjunction then a great healing power to cure others.

## Uranus + Sun conjunction:

This conjunction represents a person who is here to change the
views of society and world at large through new age technology. If
Uranus is not combust, the Sun's brightness can bring about
someone who may revolutionize the industry they work in. The

Sun is the karaka of career, our self-image, and ego. Uranus'
eccentric nature and sudden changes can bring about ups and
downs in one's status and self-esteem.

## Uranus + Moon conjunction:

This is a very turbulent conjunction for the mind. This native can
have a sudden burst of anger, or suddenly wants to love and be
loved. Uranus' electric charge shocks the Moon, and the mind is
always in stealth mode. This can lead to mental disorders or
delusions. The mind always seeks to break boundaries and taboo.
These people are also interested in online businesses, electronics,
and politics.

## Uranus + Mercury conjunction:

This conjunction makes for a very eccentric communicator.
Sometimes, the native has no idea what they are saying. Their
speech is very sharp and to the point. This conjunction can create a
psychopathic genius. The natives can have a photographic
memory, ability to learn many languages, and solve any kind of
math problem. On the other hand, they can also become Hannibal
Lecter. I am not saying this is 100% true of this conjunction, but
with the right type of aspect, sign, and house placement, it can
certainly give someone that character's mindset.

## Uranus + Venus conjunction:

A dynamic lover is what comes to mind with this conjunction.
They planets throw a bolt of passion and romance upon the native
with great strength. They are unique in their style and approach
towards the opposite sex, and they use their sexual power to lure

others. The problem arises with eccentric patterns in a relationship.
They can fall in love in one night, and fall out the next morning.
Usually, such people love using dating websites and internet. Their
way of expressing artistic talent is very dramatic and with force.

## Uranus + Mars conjunction:

When a soldier like Mars gets the power of a lightning bolt like
Uranus, there is nothing but destruction. These natives fight to kill
and protect. Their anger can lead to a sudden stabbing, shooting, or
crime of passion. They are fearless, and charge ahead without any
doubt. They build their own path and their own destination. Their
will power is amplified here, as it's charged with electricity.
However, too much of anything is bad, and this conjunction is no
different. Use of force, anger, and fighting can lead anyone
towards a destructive path.

## Uranus + Jupiter conjunction:

This shows someone who might be a new age guru with modern
tools. The native may use the internet or social media to relay their
message. Uranus' ability to revolutionize and rebel against the
establishment, and Jupiter's ability to guide and preach, makes for
one feared teacher whose purpose can reach a mass audience and
transform a large group of people.

## Uranus + Saturn conjunction:

When freedom and restriction come together, it calls for balance.
Such people with this conjunction usually find a balance between
freedom and respecting boundaries around 30-35 years of age.

There is a tug of war where one wants to get away, yet Saturn
keeps pulling them back. If Uranus happens to be in your 9th
House with Saturn, then there would be a strong need to travel and
experience different religions and cultures. Saturn will put a
restriction on too much traveling by causing financial problems,
health problems, or educational problems. One would be forced to
learn patience, and deal with the karma that has been handed to
them.

## Uranus + Rahu conjunction:

Uranus and Rahu might be long lost brothers who love breaking
the rules, going outside the boundaries, and being rebellious
towards the establishment. The only problem is that the rebel
without a cause is equipped with a weapon of thunder and
electricity, and can strike at any time. Such people in the new age
can make for a computer hackers, scammers, computer geeks and a
master salesmen who use powerful aggression to push forward
their product. This also calls for a scientist who might just make
the most devastating bomb that can rip apart this entire solar
system. This conjunction is like playing with fire; get a little close
and you feel its warmth, get too close and you get burned.

## Uranus + Ketu conjunction:

This is quite a troublesome conjunction. Ketu's nature of getting
away from the world and finding peace in an isolated place and
place of spirituality comes in contact with loud mouth, rebellious,
and angry Uranus. Here, Ketu can hardly control the nature of
Uranus and finds sudden ups and downs in its search for
spirituality and truth about the source energy. The vibrations of
Ketu are disturbed to a point where it can break away from its own
search for spirituality and can find a newer path to God, which is
through destruction; someone like a terrorist or even a devil

worshiper who might commit murder to please the Gods just so
they can be like them. If Ketu has the highest degrees, then it can
bring about a positive change like enlightenment. Occult power
might be far more powerful than others.

## Remedies for all bad conjunctions:

There is only one remedy to overcome any bad planetary
conjunction: Shiva. Offering milk on a Shivling once a month only
in a temple, would decrease the planetary problems dramatically.
No other remedy works except connecting with the source energy
of this universe. If you are of some other religion then meditating
and looking within is a the greatest tool. You must activate your
pineal gland by meditation. I have made a video on it. This type of
meditation increases your intuition power. But Shivling doesn't see
religion, race or creed, it actually frees you from such artificial
things which are only man made.
